heading: Discontinuance of motor vehicle pool or system
label: 610 Discontinuance of motor vehicle pool or system
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)61040:491(f) (last sentence)., title II, § 211(f) (last sentence), as added , ; , .June 30, 1949, ch. 288Sept. 5, 1950, ch. 849, § 5(c)64 Stat. 583Sept. 1, 1954, ch. 1211, § 268 Stat. 1127
amendments: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)61040:491(f) (last sentence)., title II, § 211(f) (last sentence), as added , ; , .June 30, 1949, ch. 288Sept. 5, 1950, ch. 849, § 5(c)64 Stat. 583Sept. 1, 1954, ch. 1211, § 268 Stat. 1127

children.heading: .—In General
children.label: a .—In General
children.text: The Administrator of General Services shall discontinue a motor vehicle pool or system if there are no actual savings realized (based on accounting as provided in ) during a reasonable period of not longer than two successive fiscal years.section 605 of this title

children.heading: .—Return of Comparable Property
children.label: b .—Return of Comparable Property
children.text: If a motor vehicle pool or system is discontinued, the Administrator shall return to each agency involved motor vehicles and related equipment and supplies similar in kind and reasonably comparable in value to any motor vehicles and related equipment and supplies which were previously taken over by the Administrator.
